221 | 40 | Action: Press-and-release massage from head to arms. Focus: Move toward the heart; awaken circulation.
222 | 40 | Action: Massage belly, back, and legs. Focus: Firm pressure upward; move energy to the heart.
223 | 40 | Action: Hug knees to chest; rock side to side. Focus: Massage the lower back; keep neck free.
224 | 60 | Action: Inhale, rise to kneeling; Exhale, sit on heels. Focus: Fluid, slow movement; vertical spine.
059 | 60 | Action: Fold over one straight leg. Focus: Reach through the heel; lengthen from the lower back.
087 | 180 | Action: Lift legs and hips; support back with hands. Focus: Stillness in the throat; gaze at toes.
091 | 60 | Action: Lower feet over head. Focus: Stretch through heels; do not strain the neck.
031 | 30 | Action: Lie on belly; lift chest. Focus: Use back muscles; expand the ribs.
025 | 45 | Action: Lift legs and chest off floor. Focus: Lengthen the spine; breathe into the belly.
114 | 60 | Action: Sit and twist toward the upright knee. Focus: Twist on the exhale; keep chest open.
020 | 60 | Action: Stand and fold forward. Focus: Gravity pulls the spine long; knees relaxed.
200 | 120 | Action: Lie flat on back; palms up. Focus: Total surrender; let the body absorb the practice.
205 | 300 | Action: Alternate nostril breathing. Focus: Natural rhythm; balance the left and right brain.

225 | 10 | Action: Exhale, bring palms to heart center. Focus: Settle the breath; find stillness.
226 | 10 | Action: Inhale, sweep arms overhead. Focus: Lift ribs; look slightly up.
020 | 12 | Action: Exhale, fold forward. Focus: Relax neck; keep knees soft; hands to floor.
227 | 12 | Action: Inhale, step Left (right) leg back, knee down. Focus: Open chest forward; keep front knee over ankle.
033 | 12 | Action: Exhale, step Right (left) leg back to Down Dog. Focus: Lift hips high; press floor away.
228 | 8 | Action: Exhale, drop knees, chest, and chin. Focus: Eight points on the floor; elbows in.
031 | 12 | Action: Inhale, slide forward and lift chest. Focus: Shoulders down; open the heart.
033 | 12 | Action: Exhale, lift hips back to Down Dog. Focus: Stretch heels down; lengthen spine.
227 | 12 | Action: Inhale, step Right (left) leg forward, back knee down. Focus: Sink hips; lift heart.
020 | 10 | Action: Exhale, step Left (right) leg forward and fold. Focus: Let the head hang heavy.
226 | 5 | Action: Inhale, sweep arms overhead to stand. Focus: Reach through fingertips.
225 | 5 | Action: Exhale, palms to heart. Focus: Settle the breath; acknowledge the sun.
